records.discoveryNotes: Owner is motivated, has budget, wants full SEO + GBP package.

entries.title: Initial discovery call — Jan 10
entries.summary: Spoke with Marcus Webb about SEO and GBP goals. He wants to rank top 3 for landscaping in his area. Budget confirmed at $2,400/mo. Very motivated.

entries.title: Follow-up call transcript — Jan 14
entries.summary: Reviewed proposal pricing. Marcus asked about setup fees. Agreed to waive if contract signed by Jan 20.
entries.fullContent:
Jordan M.: Hey Marcus, thanks for jumping on a call today.
Marcus Webb: Of course, I looked over the proposal — looks solid.
Jordan M.: Great. Did you have any questions on the pricing?
Marcus Webb: Yeah, the setup fee. Is that negotiable?
Jordan M.: For a 12-month commitment we can waive it if you sign by Jan 20.
Marcus Webb: That works for me. Let me review with my wife and I'll get back to you.
Jordan M.: Sounds great. I'll follow up Friday.
